Home Contact Us

Contact Us

contact

Get in Touch With Us

We're here to help with all your sports locker needs. Whether you have questions about our products, need help with an order, or want to schedule a consultation — we'd love to hear from you.

Our Office

z

Canadian-owned and operated since 1996

Serving North America

m

+1 (888) 58-STALL

+1 (888) 58-STALL

d

sales@lockers.world

info@customsportslockers.com

How We Stay Competitive

As a smaller, focused business, we keep production costs down and efficiency high by managing most communications via email. This approach allows us to provide premium wood lockers at competitive prices while maintaining the quality and service you expect.

We prefer email for all inquiries. It helps us serve you better and keeps our response times quick. We typically respond within 2–3 business days.

But if you still need to chat with us, we're more than happy to take your call:

+1 (888) 58-STALL

Send Us a Message

Looking for a quote on custom lockers? Request a Quote with full project details.

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

198 West 21th Street New York, NY 10010

info@customsportslockers.com

+88 (0) 101 0000 000

  • Full locker room solutions
  • Quick ship lockers

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin production. Call for a free consultation.

Saturday: 10am to 2pm
